---
title: "Projects"
subtitle: "Mathematical work in progress, from first question to finished outcome."
page-layout: full
toc: false
listing:
  - id: mn-projects-featured
    contents: entries
    include:
      featured: true
    sort: "date desc"
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 2
    max-items: 4
    fields: [image, title, description, date, categories]
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
  - id: mn-projects-all
    contents: entries
    sort: "date desc"
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 2
    fields: [image, title, description, date, categories]
    sort-ui: [date, title]
    filter-ui: [title, description, categories]
    feed:
      items: 20
      type: partial
      title: "Projects from Math Nomad"
---

::: {.content-block .mn-page-lead}
Projects show the work while it is moving. Each page records the central question, why it matters, the present state of the work and the writing, videos or resources that grow from it.
:::

::: {.content-block .mn-project-key}
::: {.mn-project-state}
<span class="mn-state-dot mn-state-active"></span>
<strong>Working on now</strong>
<span>Active development and regular updates</span>
:::

::: {.mn-project-state}
<span class="mn-state-dot mn-state-exploring"></span>
<strong>Exploring</strong>
<span>Questions taking shape</span>
:::

::: {.mn-project-state}
<span class="mn-state-dot mn-state-complete"></span>
<strong>Completed</strong>
<span>Finished work kept as an archive</span>
:::
:::

::: {.content-block .mn-listing-section}
<p class="mn-kicker">WORKING ON NOW</p>

## Featured projects

::: {#mn-projects-featured}
:::
:::

::: {.content-block .mn-listing-section}
## All projects

Newest project pages and substantial updates appear first.

::: {#mn-projects-all}
:::
:::
